response_headers.permissions-policy: geolocation=(), midi=(), sync-xhr=(), microphone=(), camera=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), fullscreen=(self), payment=()
response_headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' http: https: blob: https://www.googletagmanager.com https://unpkg.com/ https://cdn.datatables.net https://ierp.es https://www.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http: https: https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com/ https://ierp.es; img-src 'self' data: http: https: https://w0rdp3es.portsib.es https://ierp.es https://secure.gravatar.com http://maps.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: http: https: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://w0rdp3es.portsib.es; frame-src 'self' https://www.google.com https://www.google.es https://www.youtube.com https://player.vimeo.com https://ierp.es; connect-src 'self' http: https: https://ierp.es https://region1.google-analytics.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
response_headers.access-control-allow-headers: append, delete, entries, foreach, get, has, keys, set, values, Authorization
